name: Edta
description: EDTA (EDTA and its main salts used in Disodium EDTA cosmetics, Tetrasodium EDTA, Trisodium EDTA) is a chelating agent that has been used since the 1930s and for which industrialists have complete control of processing and use. Its main property is to complex heavy metals. That is to say, it will somehow neutralize them by forming with them a complex, then serve them as carriers and evacuate them. It is therefore quite logically used in medicine to fight against heavy metal poisoning (lead for example).It is often used as a sequestrant (calcium, limestone ...) in soaps or shower gels, this allows to manage the "hard" water.The ingredient does not pose a problem for human health but its impact on the environment is disastrous: it is not biodegradable and is extremely harmful to nature. The sewage treatment plants do not hold him back and let him run into our rivers! Charcoal filters in our drinking water are not more effective at stopping it (so we are re-treating EDTA / Iron complexes). The problem is finally that he carries with him heavy metals, whose final destination is unknown.EDTA and its salts are banned in organic.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Enzymes
description: Enzymes are proteins used in detergents that can remove some difficult tasks (herbs, blood ...). They can come from different sources (not always indicated on the package), mainly we find: GMOs and others. GMO enzymes can persist on dry laundry and cause allergies. Enzymes that are not genetically modified are often used in ecological detergents and destroyed during washing.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Ester Methilique De Colza

name: Ethanolamine
description: Ethanolamine or also called Monoethanolamine (MEA) is a colorless liquid used mainly in hair coloring "ammonia-free" to replace it. It thus favors the opening of the scales of the cuticle before any permanent coloring. Ethanolamine is nevertheless manufactured from ethylene oxide and ammonia. MEA is a potential irritant / allergen for mucous membranes and skin
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethyl Acetate
description: Ethyl acetate is a solvent widely used in nail polish and solvents. It is used for its ability to dissolve other substances, including nitrocellulose, or film-forming materials found in nail polish.It is a colorless liquid with a sweet smell (smell of fruit). It is also found in many flavors thanks to its ability to evaporate quickly on the skin. It does not usually make any issue. It is forbidden in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethylhexyl Salicylate
description: Ethylhexyl Salicylate is a synthetic UVB filter. It absorbs UVB radiation (from 280 to 320 nm).
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethylenediamine
description: Ethylenediamine — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Synthetic.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethylhexyl Dimethyl Paba
description: Ethylhexyl Dimethyl PABA is a chemical sunscreen authorized for use in cosmetics in Europe. It protects against UVB rays. Because of the way it is produced, it is associated with an orange flower on our application.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate
description: Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate (octinoxate) is a chemical UVB filter (280 to 320 nm) used in sunscreens. It is suspected of being an endocrine disruptor for humans and aquatic life. It is notably implicated in the bleaching of coral reefs.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethylhexyl Triazone
description: Ethylhexyl triazone (EHT) is an organic (chemical) UV filter used in sunscreens. It absorbs UVB rays (280 to 320 nm). Aside from its less-than-virtuous chemical transformation, the ingredient is considered biodegradable (soluble) and poses no known problems once released into the environment.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Ethylhexyl Palmitate
description: Ethylhexyl palmitate (octyl palmitate) is an ingredient used in cosmetics as a solvent, carrier or perfume fixative. Its possible natural origin makes it a choice alternative to silicones, since it offers a similar texture and feel on skin or hair.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Etidronic Acid
description: Etidronic acid is used as a chelating agent in cosmetics. It creates complexes with calcium, arsenic, iron and other metal ions to neutralize them. This makes it possible to manage the use of slightly "hard" waters, which could interfere with the surfactants of the product for example. Chelators are often used in water softeners. This molecule does not pose any problems for human health, its disadvantage is that, like EDTA, it is very little biodegradable, and the complexes it forms with metals are found scattered in nature.
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Ингредиент регулируется в ЕС и Великобритании. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Etocrylene
description: Etocrylene — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Ethylparaben
description: Ethylparaben is an ethyl ester of para-hydroxybenzoic acid used in cosmetics as a preservative. This ingredient has been suspected for several years of being an endocrine disruptor. Although it has been withdrawn in 2022 from the substances to be assessed in Europe by CORAP, in 2023 the Dutch RIVM (National Institute for Public Health and the Environment) recommends further research into exposure to multiple products containing Butylparaben and the potential danger of exposure to a combination of different parabens.Serious uncertainties therefore still exist about the safety of parabens in cosmetics, and insofar as it is possible to do otherwise, following the precautionary principle, ethylparaben is associated with a red flower on our application.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах. Происхождение: Synthetic.

description: Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Extract — косметический ингредиент. Происхождение: Vegetal.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Ethylhexyl Stearate
description: Ethylhexyl stearate is an ester of stearic acid and octyl alcohol. It is widely used in the cosmetics and skincare industry for its emollient, lubricating properties and light feel.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Natural.

name: Ethylhexylglycerin
description: Ethylhexylglycerin is made from glycerine, it is used in cosmetics as an emollient humectant, it improves the skin sensation of cosmetic formulations. It is also used in deodorants as an active ingredient, it inhibits the growth and multiplication of odor-causing bacteria, while not affecting skin flora. Although it is banned in organic, because of its manufacturing process, however, it does not break any particular concerns.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Eucalyptus Globulus Leaf Oil
description: The Eucalyptus leaf has been used for hundreds of years in various remedies. For example, the plant is used in medicines to relieve the airways. In cosmetics, it is used for its flavor and antiseptic functions. It has recently been shown (Bachir, Selvakumar, 2012) that this oil may have an action in the anti-dandruff treatment of certain dandruff like Malassezia furfur. It is also effective against lice (pediculus humanus) by destroying the slow ones.It would take a whole treatise, to treat all the known benefits of this plant, however, the essential oil that contains it in pure form can be problematic, containing for example terpenes (volatile VOCs). Cineole, which is included, can also cause neuronal toxicity and convulsions at high doses.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Eugenol
description: Eugenol is a naturally occurring phenolic aromatic compound found in cloves. It is used in the manufacture of vanillin and is used in cosmetics as a flavoring agent. It is used in dentistry as an analgesic and is used in surgical cements and certain dental pastes. It also has antiseptic properties; in the United States, for example, it is used as a pesticide, classified on the list of "minimum risk pesticides." It is one of the allergens regulated by Europe.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.

note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.
